questions.clue:
[IMAGE CLUE]
(Jimmy of Clue Crew presents from Paisley Park in Chanhassen, Minnesota.) Prince will forever be associated with this: a song, an album & a movie that won an Oscar & 2 Grammys
Prince's pet birds Majesty & Divinity still live at Paisley Park & remind visitors of this song, Prince's first No. 1 hit

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Jimmy of Clue Crew presents from Paisley Park in Chanhassen, Minnesota.) One of the first videos by a black artist to get regular airplay on MTV was this one, inspired by a pink Mercury Marauder; Prince was vaulted into superstardom as the song rode up the charts
As a songwriter, Prince had the top 2 spots on the Billboard chart in 1986 when "Kiss" was No. 1 & this Bangles hit was 2

[IMAGE CLUE]
(Jimmy of Clue Crew presents from Paisley Park in Chanhassen, Minnesota.) The threat of nuclear war inspired Prince to write the lyrics, "Everybody's got a bomb, we could all die any day", but as this song also reminds us, "Life is just a party, and parties weren't meant to last"
Major ports on this Great Lake include Ashtabula & Sandusky
In 1858 this largest lake in Africa was given its royal name by the first European explorer to reach it

[IMAGE CLUE]
You can't see land in any direction as you drive 8 of the 24 miles of causeway over this Louisiana lake
Convention-al wisdom says this crescent-shaped lake was formed by the Rhone River's natural damming
We'll gamble you know the name of this super-deep lake on the Nevada border is from the Washoe for "lake"

The Union won at Gettysburg on July 3 1863 & this other vital "burg" July 4, & the Confederacy was on the ropes

An 1865 photo shows the extent of destruction in this capital
A critical 1864 fight was known as the Battle of this, for the Virginia region of dense thickets where it was fought

Not only big in furniture, this company is Sweden's largest exporter of lingonberries
Real estate is the "RE" in this company with 100,000 agents

final.clue: 13th c. Emperor Frederick II's "De Arte Venandi cum Avibus" was the first work written about this -ology
